LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JANE FIELDS' MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO MARIN COUNTY AND FOR SANCTIONS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. THE MOTION FOR FEES AND COSTS OF $2490 IS DENIED. THE COURT FOUND THAT THE MOTION TO TRANSFER WAS NOT BROUGHT IN BAD FAITH. MR. BERNHARDT'S ORAL REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES WAS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: DIANE E. WICK, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-17-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Roger Bernhardt, 666.3343, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Godfrey John Tencer, 459.3500, appearing for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JANE FIELDS' Motion To Transfer Action to Marin County And For Sanctions is denied. The motion for fees and costs of $2490 is denied. The Court found that the motion to transfer was not brought in bad faith. Mr. Bernhardt's oral request for attorney's fees was denied. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/DEW/PB) (302/DEW/PB) Judge Diane E. Wick, Reporter Maria Torreano, CSR #8600
